reference: Hi, Doctor. My two cousins love to play with our seven-month-old Miniature Pinscher. They will put their hands in the mouth of our dog, and then my cousin had an abrasion on his hand. I washed it with water and soap, while my other cousin had a small cut on his finger. Our puppy has had complete vaccinations. What should we do? Please answer. Thank you.
text: Hi, doctor. My two cousins love to play with our seven-month miniature pincher. They will put their hands in the mouth of our dog, and then my cousin had an abrasion on his hand. I washed it with water and soap. While my other cousin had a small cut on his finger. Our puppy has had complete vaccinations. What should we do? Please answer. Thank you.
